hero.subtitle: in the heart of Europe.
hero.desc: Latin American and Andean music from the roots of northern Chile to the stages of Berlin.

about.label: The Band
about.p1: was born in the streets of Iquique, Chile — a land of salt, eternal sun, and music that tastes of roots.
about.p2: In the German capital they found their second home sharing
about.p2_end: and Latin American fusion. Their music bridges two continents with every chord.
about.p3: Every performance is a sensory journey — from the Andes to the Berlin Mediterranean.

booking.label: Contact
booking.title: Do you want
booking.desc: Available for concerts, festivals, private events, and collaborations in Berlin and Europe. Write to us and let's make music together.

social_proof.label: Experience
social_proof.title: Trusted
social_proof.quote1: "The best Latin American energy we've ever had on our stage."
social_proof.quote2: "They have been with us for 2 consecutive years and every time it's a tremendous Latin American show. They made all generations dance; truly great artists."
